title: Classic Mojito
steps: Muddle mint leaves and sugar in a glass.
Squeeze in lime juice and add lime halves.
Fill glass with ice.
Pour over rum and top with soda water.
Stir gently and garnish with mint sprig.

title: Classic Margarita
steps: Salt the rim of a chilled glass.
Combine tequila, triple sec and lime juice in a shaker with ice.
Shake well for 15 seconds.
Strain into prepared glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with lime wedge.

title: Negroni
steps: Fill glass with ice.
Pour gin, vermouth and Campari over ice.
Stir for 30 seconds until chilled.
Express orange peel over glass and use as garnish.

title: Virgin Mojito
steps: Muddle mint leaves and sugar in a glass.
Squeeze in lime juice and add lime halves.
Fill glass with ice.
Top with soda water.
Stir gently and garnish with mint sprig.

title: Teh Tarik
steps: Brew black tea in boiling water for 3 minutes.
Strain into a tall cup.
Add condensed milk and evaporated milk.
Pour mixture between two cups from a height to create froth.
Repeat 3-4 times until frothy and serve hot.

title: Espresso Martini
steps: Brew a fresh espresso and let cool slightly.
Add vodka, coffee liqueur and espresso to a shaker with ice.
Shake vigorously for 15 seconds until frothy.
Double strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with 3 coffee beans.
